extensionDescription.message: Drop selected text or URLs near the page edge to search or navigate while Vivaldi UI auto-hide is active.

optionsTitle.description: Options page title and action tooltip.

optionsHeaderDescription.message: Drag selected text or URLs to a page edge, then drop to search or navigate.

searchTemplateHint.message: Use %s for the search terms. This URL is also used if the browser search API fails.

openSearchInNewTabLabel.message: Always open search results in a new tab

openUrlInNewTabLabel.message: Always open URLs in a new tab

openBehaviorHint.message: Hold Ctrl, Shift, or Command while dropping to open in a new tab even when these options are off.

overlayTitle.message: Drop to search or open URL

overlaySubtitle.message: URLs open directly. Other text searches with your browser's default search engine. Hold Ctrl, Shift, or Command to open a new tab.

unableReadSubtitle.message: Drag selected text, a link, or a plain URL.
